/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/bench-packets.dir/bench-packets.cc.o" -o /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/utils/ns3.46-bench-packets-default   -L/Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-network-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-stats-default.dylib /Users/savanisawaikar/network-monitoring/ns-3.46/build/lib/libns3.46-core-default.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
